<!-- token-harness adapter for GitHub Copilot — keep this tiny; it loads on every request -->
Start every task by reading `AGENTS.md` (project brief + operating contract) and `memory/MEMORY.md` (live state + index), then follow the operating contract in `AGENTS.md`.

Load `memory/architecture.md`, `memory/decisions.md`, or `memory/tasks.md` only when the task needs them — don't re-scan the whole repo. Keep changes small and in scope. After a meaningful change, update `memory/MEMORY.md` (and the relevant topic file) and keep the index short.
